prompt: High-end skincare advertisement in a clean split-layout composition. Background: soft light neutral (off-white or very light beige) with subtle gradient and minimal texture. A thin vertical divider line splits the composition into two equal sections. LEFT SIDE (Problems): Top-left heading: “Your Problems”. Below it, floating chat-style message bubbles: “Acne & breakouts”, “Redness & inflammation”, “Uneven skin texture”, “Dark spots & marks”, “Oily, congested skin”. Use soft grey and muted blue tones for bubbles. RIGHT SIDE (Solution): Top-right heading: “Our Solution”. Below it, place the GLAIMIZ 10% Azelaic Acid Toner bottle (exact design, label, colors, pump, and proportions must remain 100% unchanged). Product styling: Slightly elevated or softly shadowed base, Clean studio lighting, Realistic reflections on bottle, Premium, clinical skincare aesthetic. BOTTOM: Minimal clean text: “Clearer, calmer, balanced skin with GLAIMIZ”. Lighting & Style: Soft diffused studio lighting, Apple-style clean layout, High-end skincare brand feel, Ultra sharp, photorealistic, 4K. “Do not alter product label, typography, colors, or structure.”
